text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! I'm fit as a fiddle, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When you're as big as me, this is nothing but a
teensy scratch. Teensy, just like this room!
choice_data_list: I'm still worried, so please get some rest.
Just be more careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: D'aww. Thanks for worryin' about me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Your words alone have healed me right up! See, it
doesn't hurt anymo—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I give her the rest of
the day off to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Naw, you're such a worrywart, Trainer! Look at
me—I'm the picture of health!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can still run, no probl—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: These Japanese rooms are just too small for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her new injury, I give her the rest
of the day off to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I have been kinda losing focus lately.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But not payin' proper attention during training is
a big threat to my future!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And there's only one thing to do when a big threat shows up... Bang! Then, no more gettin' banged up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, we resume our
training session as per her request.
